an1.188-197:1.1:
1
(188) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my bhikkhu disciples in seniority is Aññākoṇḍañña."
an1.188-197:1.2:
2
(189) " … among those with great wisdom is Sāriputta."
an1.188-197:2.1:
3
(190) " … among those with psychic potency is Mahāmoggallāna."
an1.188-197:2.2:
4
(191) " … among those who expound the ascetic practices is Mahākassapa."
an1.188-197:2.3:
5
(192) " … among those with the divine eye is Anuruddha."
an1.188-197:2.4:
6
(193) " … among those from eminent families is Bhaddiya Kāḷigodhāyaputta."
an1.188-197:2.5:
7
(194) " … among those with a sweet voice is Lakuṇṭaka Bhaddiya."
an1.188-197:2.6:
8
(195) " … among those with the lion's roar is Piṇḍola Bhāradvāja."
an1.188-197:2.7:
9
(196) " … among those who speak on the Dhamma is Puṇṇa Mantāṇiputta."
an1.188-197:2.8:
10
(197) " … among those who explain in detail the meaning of what has been stated in brief is Mahākaccāna."
